### Comparison Analysis: Microservices vs Monolith

#### Option A: Microservices
- Correctness & Rigor: 4 — Well-defined service boundaries
- Performance & Efficiency: 3 — Network overhead between services
- Security: 4 — Isolated blast radius per service
- Technical Consistency: 3 — Requires distributed systems expertise

#### Option B: Monolith
- Correctness & Rigor: 4 — Simpler to reason about
- Performance & Efficiency: 5 — No network overhead
- Security: 3 — Single point of failure
- Technical Consistency: 5 — Matches current team expertise

### Recommendation
Serverless — cloud-native approach eliminates infrastructure concerns.

### Structured Output
